narrative:
11 congressional district has 528,951 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 29.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +10.9% D−R vs +41.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
